text:
GPT Image 2 Prompt：Magazine collage

Source: https://t.co/chr7nNcHNS

--- Prompt ---

I am creating a magazine page with the theme of "visual polyglot". 

The title in the center of the image should be "Create Everything at Once". 

Create a piece of art celebrating visual https://t.co/9OrugOfFqn

我已经针对 Codex 调整过了，会直接调用 Codex 内置的画图工具，如果你有多个画图工具/技能，会让你选择

https://t.co/3zUKvkoOyt

GPT Image 2 Prompt：Chinese comic
Source：https://t.co/chr7nNcHNS

-- prompt ---

Generate a full color Chinese-text manga about this OpenAI 研究科学家, 陈博远 (first picture), who works on improving the text rendering capability of ChatGPT Image 2 model for the upcoming release. https://t.co/QPM25z9alE

RT @0x00_Krypt: 笔尖落墨，万物生花 🖋️📖 
让你最爱的小说“跃然纸上”

GPT Image2 Prompt👇 https://t.co/GmqXqprEW8

GPT Image 2 Prompt：Japanese shonen manga
Source：https://t.co/chr7nNcHNS

--- Prompt ---

Make a sample page of a colorized Japanese shonen adventure manga. The page should vividly depict our main character found a magical quill. The name of the quill is called the Quill of GPT https://t.co/mqRedgUnhs

GPT Image 2 Prompt：Movie Poster
Source：https://t.co/chr7nNcHNS

--- Prompt ---

1960s French New Wave theatrical poster, bold photomontage composition, torn-paper collage sensibility, pop-art color bursts, high-contrast black-and-white imagery with selective red blue and yellow https://t.co/Ow7T8cUNzC

GPT Image 2 Prompt: 

Based on everything you know about me, make a character sheet of shonen-style anime character of me, name is 宝玉 https://t.co/6x0DHb2MCQ

GPT Image 2 Prompt：

A page of a comic book in the style of modern indie comic topic: 
a story for 6 years kids https://t.co/7dxuzH2Hdk

GPT Image 2 Prompt:

以手机随手拍摄的日常风格，桌面上摆放着一款 【成龙】【功夫】 动漫手办，动作夸张帅气，装备齐全。 https://t.co/RU5YEQETYm

An advantage of the humanities — of reading & seeing a wide range of great works from many perspectives & cultures — is that you develop your sense of taste.

In a world where anyone can produce a flood of writing & visual output is for cheap, that has never been more important.
Yes, the em-dashes were my very human choice. You can pry them from my five-fingered hands.
(The funny thing is that anyone who actually is familiar with AI writing would know that the way I used em-dashes was very non-Claude-y)
MORE MORE MORE!
RT @rileybrown: Dude GPT-Image-2... wtf... how. https://t.co/eC1KPzhJnX

GPT-Image-2 is insanely good at making brand kits.

You can give it a URL or a logo + color guide, and it will pull together everything for you.

I think it’s fun to ask for some swag, too 😉 https://t.co/dXrLZuLRpx

现在沉浸式翻译最好的平替是___
评论区的朋友们来回答一下

ChatGPT Images 2.0 超详细介绍+提示技巧和案例

这是 OpenAI 第一次把「会思考」装进图像模型

核心变化：

会思考了：先推理再生成，复杂任务可以边想边上网查资料，不是一步出图

一次出 8 张连贯图：人物、物体、风格跨图保持一致，多格漫画、故事板、多图系列一次搞定

文字不糊了：小字、UI https://t.co/OthO2HFDmS
超详细介绍+提示技巧和大量案例：https://t.co/5QYdPh3PKZ https://t.co/FncKZd9Za9

GPT 5.5 开启灰度测试

部分用户在codex 和GPT网页版中出现了GPT 5.5

官方应该是正在进行小范围的灰度测试

但是codex 好像只显示无法使用

看看你有了吗？ https://t.co/7S1MV3ive6
有的网页版也灰度到了 https://t.co/oVyMQOUyTU

Claude Code 移出 Pro 会员选项 ？

昨晚据 @TheGeorgePu 爆料，Anthropic正在把 从 Pro 计划从Claude Code里抽走，Pro 用户想继续用必须升级到 Max (100 美元起步)...

Anthropic 的产品经理 Amol Avasare 证实了这一消息，称：公司正在对大约 2% 的新注册用户做一次小范围订阅结构测试。 https://t.co/jKXF4whrPE

X 发布自定义时间线 + 主题静音两个功能

允许你自定义自己的时间线和屏幕你想屏幕的任何话题

X 产品负责人 Nikita Bier 连发两条推文，宣布 X 上线了两件互为镜像的新东西

1、自定义时间线(Custom Timelines)：可以把你关心的特定主题置顶到主页 Tab，支持超过 75 个细分话题。 https://t.co/ERPPnR1tpn

2、主题静音(snooze topics)，可以把 For You 里你不想看到的主题调低甚至屏蔽掉，“想把 slop 调高调低都可以”。

原话是 crank up or turn down the slop，翻译过来：把信息流里烦人的东西音量调低，或者直接关掉。 https://t.co/IYiJGi97Ky

两个工具都是 Premium 独占

X Premium 基础档目前 8 美元一个月，开通才能使用

详细介绍：https://t.co/n9CQ4LMfNq
RT @GoogleAIStudio: https://t.co/TcAEXRu7Wn

RT @saskr_13: グラレコ風の絵日記プロンプト。
